narrative: Audited 10 release pages × all trilingual leaves. ONE release-impacting defect found: page 87, question 4 (X社/A社 dispatch context), choice D EN text contains duplicated marker prefix 'D. No inversion, no hallucination, no dropped clauses, no glossary collisions, no JP era leakage problems (令和/平成 preserved symmetrically). Choice-marker convention: jp uses ア./イ./ウ./エ., zh+en use A./B./C./D. — compliant everywhere EXCEPT p087::4 choice[3].en.
